title: fimbristylis alpestris
intro: Fimbristylis alpestris, also known as Alpine Fimbri-stylis, is a type of grassy plant that belongs to the Cyperaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Fimbristylis alpestris include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and skin conditions, while also being used as a natural remedy for digestive issues and wounds. Herbal preparations of Fimbristylis alpestris can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
